LanguageData.FB_FleshmassNucleusAssimilator_CommandDe: Select a fleshmass nucleus on this map. A pawn with Basic work will carry it to this heart, permanently increasing passive hemogel production.
LanguageData.FB_FleshmassNucleusAssimilator_InvalidTa: Select a spawned fleshmass nucleus on this map.
LanguageData.FB_FleshmassNucleusAssimilator_NoHeart: No player colony heart can assimilate this nucleus.
LanguageData.FB_FleshmassNucleusAssimilator_TargetAlr: This fleshmass nucleus is already assigned to another colony heart.
LanguageData.FB_FleshmassNucleusAssimilator_Assigned: {0} has been assigned for assimilation by {1}.
LanguageData.FB_FleshmassNucleusAssimilator_Success: {0} assimilated a fleshmass nucleus. Assimilated nuclei: {1}.
